summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kenbot Dashboard - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: All 6 backend API endpoints working (system/status, cron/runs, inventory, posts, changelog, architecture)
Dashboard loads with 4 stat cards showing correct data (5 active vehicles, 5 active posts, 2 no-photo, last run time)
Navigation tabs work perfectly (Dashboard, Inventaire, Posts FB, Architecture, Changelog)
Cron runs table displays 5 runs with proper status badges (OK/ERROR)
Posts mini-list shows NO PHOTO badges correctly for 2 posts without photos
Inventory table displays 6 vehicle records with proper formatting
Architecture page shows state machine with 5 states (NEW/SOLD/RESTORE/PRICE_CHANGED/PHOTOS_ADDED)
Architecture page shows 9 system components in grid layout
Changelog page shows v2.1.0 PHOTOS_ADDED bugfix with 3 changes (critical/critical/medium)
Posts FB tab shows no-photo section highlighting 2 posts needing photos
Swiss brutalist design implemented correctly with proper fonts and styling
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Demo data seeded correctly in MongoDB (6 inventory, 6 posts, 5 cron runs)
